infringements.steward_decision_summary: 2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX 03 - 05 July 2026 The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 18:00, in relation to the incident below: The Stewards From The Stewards To The Team Manager, McLaren Mastercard F1 Team Document 55 Date 04 July 2026 Time 17:23 No / Driver 81 - Os

raw_text_excerpt:
2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX
03 - 05 July 2026
The driver and team representative are required to report to the Stewards at 18:00, in relation to the
incident below:
 
The Stewards
From The Stewards
To The Team Manager,
McLaren Mastercard F1 Team
Document 55
Date 04 July 2026
Time 17:23
No / Driver 81 - Oscar Piastri
Reason Alleged Breach of Article B1.6.2 b) i) of the FIA F1 Regulations – Unsafe Release by
Car 41 at 17:04.
Gerd Ennser Tanja Geilhausen
Mathieu Remmerie Pedro Lamy
Richard Norbury
